title: orthopogon hispidus
intro: Orthopogon hispidus, also known as Vetiver or Khus, is a perennial grass native to India and Southeast Asia, known for its fragrant and medicinal properties. The medicinal properties of Orthopogon hispidus include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of this plant include reducing stress, promoting relaxation, and providing relief from insomnia and anxiety, due to its calming and sedative effects. Orthopogon hispidus is often used in herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and infusions, to promote overall well-being and relaxation.
